mapper.sql: r.id, r.reader_id, r.book_id, r.rating_score, r.review_content, r.created_at, r.updated_at, r.deleted, u.username as reader_username, b.title as book_title
mapper.select: select from book_reviews r join users u on r.reader_id = u.id join books b on r.book_id = b.id where r.deleted = false order by r.created_at desc, r.id desc
select from book_reviews r join users u on r.reader_id = u.id join books b on r.book_id = b.id where r.book_id = #{bookId} and r.deleted = false order by r.created_at desc, r.id desc
select from book_reviews r join users u on r.reader_id = u.id join books b on r.book_id = b.id where r.reader_id = #{readerId} and r.book_id = #{bookId} and r.deleted = false limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into book_reviews(reader_id, book_id, rating_score, review_content, created_at, updated_at, deleted) values(#{reader.id}, #{book.id}, #{ratingScore}, #{reviewContent}, now(), now(), false)
mapper.update: update book_reviews set rating_score = #{ratingScore}, review_content = #{reviewContent}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
